overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial district with graffiti-covered walls, power lines, and factories. The character progresses from a narrow sidewalk past a water tower and through sunlit streets, eventually running toward a large MILITECH industrial facility with towering smokestacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk next to graffiti-covered retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following an NPC in a business suit

notable_agents.action: walking ahead along the sidewalk wearing a dark business suit

entered.detail: tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large industrial warehouse buildings with metal roofing and piping
dense network of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing above the street
tall palm trees visible above the wall in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow industrial sidewalk bordered by a tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti on the left and industrial warehouses on the right. An NPC in a business suit walks ahead, and overhead power lines crisscross the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with water tower and transmission towers

events.description: exits narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection with view of water tower
turns right slightly to cross toward the street with the water tower

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection toward the water tower and power transmission structures

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal water tower on stilts in the distance
tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple cross-arms
orange street sign reading 'Longshore N' mounted on a pole
elevated industrial walkway or pipe bridge spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide industrial intersection dominated by a large water tower and metal transmission towers. The camera crosses the asphalt road, passing under a 'Longshore N' street sign, with the graffiti wall now behind and an overhead industrial bridge coming into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead walkways and autowerks garage

agents.ego_description: walking down the sunlit industrial street toward the distant MILITECH facility

entered.detail: yellow illuminated sign reading 'Autowerks' on the right side building
large industrial facility with red 'MILITECH' signage visible in the distance
large digital screen displaying advertisements above the MILITECH building

segments.scene_description: Proceeding down a broad industrial street bathed in warm sunlight with long shadows. An overhead industrial walkway spans the road, and the yellow 'Autowerks' sign is visible on the right. In the distance, the MILITECH building and its digital billboard become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: MILITECH industrial facility plaza with smokestacks

events.description: character transitions from walking to running toward the MILITECH building entrance
traffic light changes to red as the character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: running toward the MILITECH facility entrance, passing through the industrial plaza with towering smokestacks

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal storage silos with ladder rungs on the exterior

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run, approaching the massive MILITECH industrial complex. Towering cylindrical silos and smokestacks emitting steam dominate the scene. The camera moves through the plaza, looking up at the imposing industrial architecture as the traffic light turns red.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling corporate complex. It begins on a cramped sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete wall and warehouses, following an NPC under a web of crisscrossing power lines. As the path expands, the camera crosses a wide asphalt intersection dominated by a large water tower and transmission towers, passing under a street sign before the view opens toward an overhead industrial bridge. The scene then shifts into a broad, sun-drenched street where long shadows stretch past an Autowerks sign and a distant digital billboard. Finally, the character breaks into a run, moving through a plaza toward the massive Militech facility as the camera tilts up to reveal towering silos and steam-emitting smokestacks.
